positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for romance_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,axiom,
    french != spanish).

cnf(u33,negated_conjecture,
    ~romance_language(basque)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    french != basque).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    romance_language(spanish)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~related_to(X0,basque) | basque = X0).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    romance_language(french)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    related_to(german,spanish)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    german != basque).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~related_to(basque,X0) | basque = X0).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    is_family_of(X0,romance_family) | ~romance_language(X0)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    related_to(X0,X1) | X0 = X1 | ~romance_language(X1) | ~romance_language(X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    spanish != german).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    spanish != basque).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~is_family_of(X1,X2) | ~is_family_of(X0,X2) | related_to(X0,X1) | X0 = X1).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    french != german).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    ~is_family_of(X0,romance_family) | related_to(X0,X1) | X0 = X1 | ~romance_language(X1)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~is_family_of(X0,romance_family) | romance_language(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define language_family(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define indo_european_language(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for romance_negative
% SZS output start Proof for romance_negative
2. ! [X0] : (romance_language(X0) <=> is_family_of(X0,romance_family)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((is_family_of(X0,X2) & is_family_of(X1,X2) & X0 != X1) => related_to(X0,X1)) [input(axiom)]
6. romance_language(spanish) [input(axiom)]
8. ! [X0] : (X0 != basque => (~related_to(basque,X0) & ~related_to(X0,basque))) [input(axiom)]
9. french != spanish & french != german & french != basque & spanish != german & spanish != basque & german != basque [input(axiom)]
10. ~romance_language(basque) [input(conjecture)]
11. ~~romance_language(basque) [negated conjecture 10]
12. romance_language(basque) [flattening 11]
15. ! [X0] : (romance_language(X0) => is_family_of(X0,romance_family)) [unused predicate definition removal 2]
16. ! [X0] : (is_family_of(X0,romance_family) | ~romance_language(X0)) [ennf transformation 15]
17. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (related_to(X0,X1) | (~is_family_of(X0,X2) | ~is_family_of(X1,X2) | X0 = X1)) [ennf transformation 4]
18. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (related_to(X0,X1) | ~is_family_of(X0,X2) | ~is_family_of(X1,X2) | X0 = X1) [flattening 17]
19. ! [X0] : ((~related_to(basque,X0) & ~related_to(X0,basque)) | basque = X0) [ennf transformation 8]
20. is_family_of(X0,romance_family) | ~romance_language(X0) [cnf transformation 16]
21. ~is_family_of(X1,X2) | ~is_family_of(X0,X2) | related_to(X0,X1) | X0 = X1 [cnf transformation 18]
23. romance_language(spanish) [cnf transformation 6]
26. ~related_to(basque,X0) | basque = X0 [cnf transformation 19]
28. spanish != basque [cnf transformation 9]
33. romance_language(basque) [cnf transformation 12]
34. ~is_family_of(X0,romance_family) | related_to(X0,X1) | X0 = X1 | ~romance_language(X1) [resolution 21,20]
35. related_to(X0,X1) | X0 = X1 | ~romance_language(X1) | ~romance_language(X0) [resolution 34,20]
37. basque = X0 | ~romance_language(X0) | ~romance_language(basque) | basque = X0 [resolution 35,26]
38. basque = X0 | ~romance_language(X0) | ~romance_language(basque) [duplicate literal removal 37]
40. ~romance_language(X0) | basque = X0 [forward subsumption resolution 38,33]
44. spanish = basque [resolution 40,23]
45. $false [forward subsumption resolution 44,28]
% SZS output end Proof for romance_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
